description: ConnectedPDF is a Foxit-operated domain used for document and PDF-related services. Public materials on and around the domain reference Foxit PDF cloud capabilities and an MCP endpoint used with Foxit PDF Editor and related PDF automation workflows.
summary: connectedpdf.com exposes a public MCP server for Foxit PDF Editor plus documented Foxit HTTP APIs for PDF Services, Document Generation, eSign, and PDF Embed; public docs confirm the MCP endpoint, while the HTTP APIs require Foxit-issued credentials but their exact public auth bindings/base URLs were not exposed in the pages found.
